script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Good morning. It's July 10th, 2026.
script.ja: おはようございます。2026年7月10日です。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: Morning, Alex. Welcome to The Daily Tanu-chan Show.
script.ja: おはよう、アレックス。「デイリーたぬちゃんショー」へようこそ。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Thanks, Sarah. It's overcast again today, huh? Still feels pretty warm, though.
script.ja: ありがとう、サラ。今日も曇りだね？でも、まだかなり暑い感じだ。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: Yeah, low chance of rain, but definitely warm. About 30 degrees later.
script.ja: ええ、雨の可能性は低いけど、間違いなく暖かい。後で30度くらいになるわ。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Ugh. I need more coffee. My little one was up at 4 AM today, so I'm already wiped out.
script.ja: うう。もっとコーヒーが必要だ。うちの子が今日は午前4時に起きたから、もうぐったりだよ。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: Mine used to do that. It gets better.
script.ja: うちの子も昔はそうだったわ。そのうち良くなるわよ。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: I hope so. Hey, did you see that news about a music venue looking for a band to live and perform there for a week?
script.ja: そうだといいんだけど。ねえ、音楽会場が1週間住み込みで演奏するバンドを探してるっていうニュース見た？

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: I did. That's a lot of commitment.
script.ja: 見たわ。すごい覚悟が必要ね。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Yeah, imagine trying to do that with a baby at home. I'd probably accidentally mix up all my lyrics. Or maybe 'inadvertently' is the right word?
script.ja: うん、家に赤ちゃんがいるのにそれやろうとしたら大変だろうな。たぶん、うっかり歌詞を全部ごちゃ混ぜにしちゃいそうだ。それとも「inadvertently」が正しい言葉なのかな？

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: Yes, 'inadvertently' means doing something by accident, or without meaning to.
script.ja: ええ、「inadvertently」は、うっかり、とか、意図せず何かをしてしまうという意味よ。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Ah, got it. Like I'd inadvertently spill my coffee this morning if I wasn't careful.
script.ja: ああ、分かった。今朝、気をつけないと、うっかりコーヒーをこぼしちゃう、みたいな。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: (sips tea) Exactly.
script.ja: （お茶をすすりながら）その通り。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: The news about Fukushima rebuilding with fish farms and hula dancers is pretty amazing, though.
script.ja: でも、福島が養殖魚とフラダンスで復興してるっていうニュースは、かなりすごいね。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: It's good to see that. They've made so much progress since 2011.
script.ja: そうね、良いことだわ。2011年以来、本当に大きな進歩を遂げたわね。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Yeah, a truly sizable effort. It's been a long road for them. I hope they're getting some peace now, some real quiet.
script.ja: うん、本当にかなりの努力だ。彼らにとっては長い道のりだったね。今、彼らが安らぎ、本当の静けさを得ていることを願うよ。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: You mean like a 'respite'? A period of rest from something difficult.
script.ja: 「respite（休息）」のこと？困難なことから一時的に解放される期間のことね。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: That's the word! Respite. That's perfect. They deserve it.
script.ja: それだ！レスパイト。完璧な言葉だ。彼らはそれに値するよ。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: They do.
script.ja: そうね。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Also, the Yuki Tsumugi silk from Tochigi. I didn't know much about traditional silk manufacturing there.
script.ja: あと、栃木の結城紬の絹。そこの伝統的な絹の製造についてはあまり知らなかったな。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: It's a very famous craft. It takes a lot of skill.
script.ja: とても有名な工芸品よ。かなりの技術が必要なの。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Sounds like it. Hey, do you know what day it is today? Today is Cultured Pearl Invention Day!
script.ja: そうみたいだね。ねえ、今日が何の日か知ってる？今日は真珠養殖発明記念日だよ！

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: Oh, that's right. Mikimoto Kokichi. 1893.
script.ja: ああ、そうだったわね。御木本幸吉。1893年よ。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Yeah, when he first succeeded in culturing pearls. That's pretty cool.
script.ja: うん、彼が初めて真珠の養殖に成功した日。すごいよね。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: A very important day for Mie Prefecture.
script.ja: 三重県にとってはとても大切な日ね。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Makes me think about dinner tonight. I've been craving ramen all week. A really rich tonkotsu bowl.
script.ja: 今日の夕食のこと考えちゃうな。今週ずっとラーメンが食べたかったんだ。すごく濃厚な豚骨ラーメン。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: I tend to prefer a lighter shio ramen myself.
script.ja: 私はあっさりした塩ラーメンの方が好きね。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Yeah, sometimes. But today, I need that rich broth to make it through.
script.ja: うん、時々ね。でも今日は、この濃いスープで乗り切りたい気分だよ。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: I understand that feeling. More coffee for you, then.
script.ja: その気持ちは分かるわ。じゃあ、あなたはもっとコーヒーね。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Definitely. Have a good one, Sarah.
script.ja: 絶対だね。じゃあ、良い一日を、サラ。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: You too, Alex.
script.ja: あなたもね、アレックス。

wikipedia.title: 養殖真珠発明記念日
wikipedia.description: 1893（明治26）年、三重県鳥羽町の御木本幸吉が初めて真珠の養殖に成功した。
